void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=route-subprocess-template&lbpmTmpId=route-subprocess-lbpm" fdId="route-subprocess-process" linesIndex="3" nodesIndex="4" notifyType="todo"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="Start" x="100" y="40"/> <startSubProcessNode configContent="{"subProcess":{"modelName":"com.example.Child","templateId":"route-child-template","templateName":"Route Child"},"startCountType":1,"startParamenters":[{"name":{"text":"Subject","value":"fdSubject","type":"String"},"expression":{"text":"$Subject$","value":"$fd_subject$"}}]}" id="N20" name="Start child" x="260" y="40"/> <recoverSubProcessNode configContent="{"subProcessNode":"N20","variableScope":2,"recoverRule":{"type":1,"expression":{"text":"","value":""}},"recoverParamenters":[{"name":{"text":"Child result","value":"fd_result","type":"String"},"expression":{"text":"$Child subject$","value":"$fdSubject$"}}]}" id="N23" name="Recover child" x="420" y="40"/> <endNode id="N3" name="End" x="580" y="40"/> </nodes> <lines> <line endNodeId="N20" id="L1" startNodeId="N1"/> <line endNodeId="N23" id="L2" startNodeId="N20"/> <line endNodeId="N3" id="L3" startNodeId="N23"/> </lines> </process>
